title: Sand Filter
description: Add Thirst Was Taken sand filter to Legendary Survival Overhaul mod
body:
**ATTENTION: [Legendary Survival Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-survival-overhaul) is a REQUIRED dependency!**

### Introduction
This mod simply add a sand filter block from [Thirst Was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken) to [Legendary Survival Overhaul](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-survival-overhaul).
